verdict.judge_question_strategy_notes: The judge failed to utilize the multi-agent pipeline. The initial assessments were highly consistent (all pointing to Japan), but the judge did not ask any follow-up questions to verify the specific infrastructure or botanical claims, nor did it attempt to resolve the minor South Korea candidate raised by the landscape and regulatory agents. The decision was made without any discussion.
verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The final reasoning correctly synthesized the strong botanical and regulatory evidence to identify Japan. However, the lack of discussion meant the judge did not actively test the robustness of these claims against the counter-hypothesis (South Korea) raised by the agents.
